examples: Mike: I want to get some skiwear after work. I'm going skiing this weekend, too.
Their main products are sporty leisurewear such as beanies, fleece- and CVC products but also technical skiwear such as 3-layer ski jackets, goggles and helmets.
On the non-tech side, he uses Salomon skis and prefers Red Phenix skiwear.
But a few years ago, founder Stephen Sullivan sold the company, which is now part of private equity group that owns other skiwear manufacturers.
